sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87271" key="proendei/knumai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προεν-δείκνῠμαι</orth>, <sense id="n87271.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exhibit oneself</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make a demonstration before,</tr_> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg003.perseus-grc1:219" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.219</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
